name: iron-crown
flavor_texts: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.
There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.
text: Iron-crown is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a steel and psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: quark-drive. Base stats — HP: 90, Attack: 72, Defense: 100, Sp. Atk: 122, Sp. Def: 108, Speed: 98. Evolution line: iron-crown. Lore: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion. There was supposedly an incident in which it launched shining blades to cut everything around it to pieces. Little else is known about it.
